Nhanh
15 Skills Banking Rules Lịch sử delivery

Banking-Grade Copilot Package

📅 Last updated: 2026-05-13 📁 Files: 64 0 broken refs 0 security issues Package-only repo
Standalone .github/ Copilot package. Không phụ thuộc vào folder ngoài. Copy toàn bộ vào target repository là dùng được.

Mục đích

Biến GitHub Copilot thành một senior engineer có kỷ luật ngân hàng: phân tích trước, lên kế hoạch trước, cần approval mới implement, review từng dòng, cập nhật docs sau mỗi thay đổi.

Thành phần

LoạiSố lượngVị tríMô tả
Instructions3.github/instructions/Quy tắc tự động theo loại file
Prompts17.github/prompts/Workflow gọi bằng /tên
Agents8.github/agents/Personas gọi trong Agent mode
Skills15.github/skills/Domain knowledge tự động
Workflow1.github/workflows/Manual governance checks
Knowledge base12+4.github/copilot/RAG docs + reference patterns
Docs base4.github/docs/Tài liệu dự án (file này)

15 Curated Skills

SkillKhi nào active
banking-grade-engineeringMọi lúc — core policy
system-analysisTrước plan / implement / review
codebase-readingKhi đọc / giải thích code hiện có
business-logic-analysisKiểm tra business rules, invariants
code-solution-fitTrước khi viết / thay đổi code
planning-governanceTrước bất kỳ thay đổi code / config
secure-code-reviewSau implement, completion gates
testing-verificationSau thay đổi code, trước khi done
docs-base-maintenanceSau feature / fix / migration / security
root-cause-debuggingBug, failing tests, incidents
backend-api-governanceBackend code, API, auth, validation
database-data-integritySchema, migration, query, transaction
release-devops-governanceCI/CD, deployment, infrastructure
aspnet-core-governance.NET / ASP.NET Core (conditional)
dotnet-testing.NET test planning & verification

Banking Grade Delivery Rules

  1. Khi có reference / old project: đọc và so sánh trước khi làm bất cứ thứ gì.
  2. Plan before dev — tạo plan với scope, risks, rollback, verification, docs.
  3. Developer / user review và approve plan trước khi implement.
  4. Solution phải fit codebase hiện tại — không tự tạo kiến trúc song song.
  5. Review every changed line — correctness, security, privacy, data integrity.
  6. Bảo vệ secrets, credentials, customer data, account data, card data, PII.
  7. Chạy hoặc ghi nhận verification checks (build / lint / test / security).
  8. Update docs base sau mỗi feature hoặc behavior change.
  9. Ghi rollback và residual risk cho production-impacting changes.
  10. Format ngay sau khi AI gen code: dotnet format <solution> --include <changed-files> --no-restore — chỉ format file vừa viết, không format toàn project.

Verification Commands

Chạy từ repository root:

rg --files -uu .github

Get-ChildItem .github\skills -Directory | ForEach-Object {
  if (-not (Test-Path (Join-Path $_.FullName "SKILL.md"))) {
    throw "Missing SKILL.md: $($_.FullName)"
  }
}

$secretPattern = '(?i)(password|passwd|pwd|secret|token|api[_-]?key|client[_-]?secret)\s*[:=]\s*["''][^"''\s]{12,}["'']'
Get-ChildItem .github -Recurse -File | Select-String -Pattern $secretPattern

Secret-pattern command phải trả về không có matches.

Operational Notes

  • Copilot là assistant, không phải approver cuối cùng.
  • Human review vẫn bắt buộc với regulated banking code.
  • MCP và terminal execution phụ thuộc vào local / enterprise policy.
  • Workflow manual-governance-checks.yml là manual-only cho repo này. Khi deploy sang target repo có code, bật pull_request trigger.

Project Docs Base

Last updated: 2026-05-13

Living docs — luôn giữ aligned với instructions, prompts, agents, skills, governance hiện tại.

Current Scope

Package chứa banking-grade GitHub Copilot customization assets:

  • .github/copilot-instructions.md
  • .github/instructions/*.instructions.md
  • .github/prompts/*.prompt.md
  • .github/agents/*.agent.md
  • .github/skills/*/SKILL.md
  • .github/workflows/*.yml
  • .github/copilot/**/*.md
  • .github/docs/*.md

Analysis-First Focus

  • Khi có reference / old project: đọc và so sánh trước
  • Dùng .github/copilot/references/ cho deep reference knowledge khi skills quá ngắn
  • Đọc code và docs hiện có trước khi đề xuất thay đổi
  • Giải thích flow hiện tại và business logic trước khi edit
  • Map blast radius trước khi solution
  • Tạo plan và chờ developer review trước khi implement
  • Base solutions trên codebase structure hiện tại

Curated Skills (15)

  • banking-grade engineering
  • system analysis
  • codebase reading
  • business logic analysis
  • code solution fit
  • planning governance
  • secure code review
  • testing verification
  • docs base maintenance
  • root cause debugging
  • backend API governance
  • database data integrity
  • release / devops governance
  • ASP.NET Core governance
  • dotnet testing

Banking Grade Delivery Rules

  1. Reference / old project comparison là bắt buộc khi được cung cấp.
  2. Plan before dev.
  3. Developer / user review và approve plan trước khi implement.
  4. Solution must fit the existing codebase first.
  5. Review every changed line.
  6. Protect secrets, credentials, customer data, account data, card data, PII, internal bank identifiers.
  7. Run or record verification checks.
  8. Update docs base sau mỗi feature hoặc behavior change.
  9. Record rollback và residual risk cho production-impacting changes.
  10. Immediately after writing or modifying bất kỳ .cs, .razor, hoặc .cshtml file: format only those files: dotnet format <solution-or-project> --include <changed-file-paths> --no-restore. Do not format the whole project.

Verification Commands

rg --files -uu .github

Get-ChildItem .github\skills -Directory | ForEach-Object {
  if (-not (Test-Path (Join-Path $_.FullName "SKILL.md"))) {
    throw "Missing SKILL.md: $($_.FullName)"
  }
}

$secretPattern = '(?i)(password|passwd|pwd|secret|token|api[_-]?key|client[_-]?secret)\s*[:=]\s*["''][^"''\s]{12,}["'']'
Get-ChildItem .github -Recurse -File | Select-String -Pattern $secretPattern

Secret-pattern command should return no matches.

Operational Notes

  • Copilot is an assistant, not the final approver.
  • Human review remains mandatory for regulated banking code.
  • MCP and terminal execution depend on local/enterprise policy.

Project Changelog

2026-05-13

  • Added post-generate format rule: Copilot formats only the files it just wrote or modified (dotnet format --include <changed-files> --no-restore) immediately after generating any .cs, .razor, or .cshtml file. Rule embedded in copilot-instructions.md, aspnet-core.instructions.md, implement.prompt.md, fix.prompt.md, and devloop.prompt.md.
  • Added huong-dan-su-dung.md user guide to .github/docs/.
  • Added manual-only .github/workflows/manual-governance-checks.yml for build, test, lint, secret pattern scanning, CodeQL SAST, and .NET dependency audit.
  • Removed out-of-scope payment-specific and web-frontend-specific Copilot assets and catalog references.
  • Replaced generic npm verification examples with repository-accurate .github package verification commands.
  • Added system-analysis focus based on trusted reference package:
    • codebase reading before planning
    • code explanation prompts
    • business logic and logic-check prompts
    • codebase-fit solution rules
    • ASP.NET Core and dotnet testing governance
    • system analyst custom agent
  • Added plan approval gate before implementation.
  • Promoted reference/old-project-first comparison into the critical banking gates and delivery workflow.
  • Added sanitized .github/copilot/references/ knowledge so old skill references are represented without copying unsafe scripts or project-specific local material.
  • Converted the Copilot base into a standalone .github/ package.
  • Moved explanatory knowledge into .github/copilot/.
  • Moved docs base into .github/docs/.
  • Removed package references to external local folders.
  • Replaced migration-only skill with curated Copilot skills.
  • Added banking-grade engineering gates:
    • plan before dev
    • line-by-line review
    • security / privacy / data controls
    • rollback notes
    • verification evidence
    • docs base update after every feature

Feature Delivery Log

Ghi nhận sau mỗi feature, fix, migration, architecture change, security change, operational change, hoặc setup change.

2026-05-13 — Post-Generate Format Rule & User Guide Latest

Plan

  • Thêm rule yêu cầu Copilot format chỉ file vừa viết, ngay sau khi gen — không format toàn project.
  • Thêm user guide (huong-dan-su-dung.md) vào .github/docs/.

Changed Files

  • .github/copilot-instructions.md — step 6 includes immediate post-gen format command
  • .github/instructions/aspnet-core.instructions.md — added Formatting Rules section
  • .github/prompts/implement.prompt.md — format rule embedded in implementation rules
  • .github/prompts/fix.prompt.md — format step added after file modification
  • .github/prompts/devloop.prompt.md — format step added inside implement phase
  • .github/docs/project-docs-base.md — format rule added to Banking Grade Delivery Rules
  • .github/docs/project-changelog.md — entry added
  • .github/docs/huong-dan-su-dung.md — new user guide (HTML+Markdown)

Verification

  • Grep scan: no references to removed hooks/ directory remain in any active file
  • Grep scan: format rule present in all 5 target files
  • Not run: runtime dotnet format execution (package-only repo)

Line Review

  • Critical/high: none
  • Resolved: removed pre-commit hook approach (wrong timing); replaced with post-gen inline rule
  • Residual risk: rule is instruction-level — depends on Copilot following the instruction at inference time

Security / Privacy / Data Impact

None.

Rollback

Remove the Formatting Rules sections from the five changed files to revert format behavior.

2026-05-13 — Manual Governance Workflows & Scope Trim

Plan

  • Add manual-only governance workflow checks (CI not yet enabled for package repo).
  • Remove out-of-scope payment-specific and web-frontend-specific Copilot assets.
  • Replace generic npm verification examples with .github-accurate commands.

Changed Files

  • .github/workflows/manual-governance-checks.yml
  • .github/copilot-instructions.md
  • .github/instructions/banking-grade-engineering.instructions.md
  • .github/agents/security-reviewer.agent.md
  • .github/skills/business-logic-analysis/SKILL.md
  • .github/skills/banking-grade-engineering/SKILL.md
  • .github/copilot/*
  • .github/docs/*

Removed Files

  • .github/skills/payments-risk-governance/SKILL.md
  • .github/skills/frontend-quality/SKILL.md
  • .github/agents/ui-ux-designer.agent.md
  • .github/prompts/design.prompt.md

Verification

  • rg --files -uu .github
  • rg -n -i "payment|payments|frontend|front-end|ui ux|ui/ux|web frontend" .github
  • Manual workflow added; payment and frontend active assets removed.
  • Not run: GitHub Actions (package-only, CI manual for now)

Line Review

  • Resolved: Workflow now checks removed asset paths instead of scanning docs for historical words.
  • Residual risk: Target application repository still needs branch protection and CODEOWNERS.

Rollback

Revert if target repository later needs payment or web frontend Copilot guidance.

Follow-Ups

  • Enable pull request triggers after installing into a real application repository.
  • Add CODEOWNERS and branch protection in the target repository.
2026-05-13 — Standalone Banking Grade Copilot Package

Plan

  • Convert Copilot customization into standalone .github/ package.
  • Promote only reviewed, Markdown-only, governance-safe skills.
  • Remove dependency on external local folders.

Key Changes

  • 15 curated Markdown-only skills promoted.
  • Banking-grade gates added: plan before dev, line review, security/privacy/data controls, rollback, verification, docs update.
  • No shell scripts or tool automation copied into skills.

Verification

  • File inventory, Markdown/frontmatter inspection completed.
  • copilot-instructions.md kept compact so banking gates remain near the top.
  • No references to external local folders.

Rollback

Revert .github/ files to previous Copilot configuration if policy is too strict for a target project.

2026-05-13 — System Analysis & Codebase-Fit Hardening

Plan

Compare trusted reference package against current standalone package. Import stronger reference behaviors as clean Copilot-native files.

Key Additions

  • System analysis, codebase reading, logic checking skills
  • ASP.NET Core governance and dotnet testing skills
  • Dev-loop approval flow in /devloop prompt
  • System analyst custom agent
  • Codebase analysis playbook

Rollback

Revert listed files if target repository should not include ASP.NET/.NET or system-analysis enhancements.

2026-05-13 — Reference-First Banking Flow Highlight

Gap Found

Codebase-first and plan gates existed, but reference-first comparison was not promoted as a top critical gate.

Fix

Added mandatory reference-first rule in copilot-instructions.md and mirrored across workflow, analysis playbook, banking plan, and docs.

Residual risk

Target repository still needs stack-specific verification commands after this package is installed.

2026-05-13 — Sanitized Reference Knowledge Migration

Plan

Move safe deeper knowledge from old skills/*/references structure into .github/copilot/references/ as sanitized RAG-friendly docs.

Added Reference Docs

  • .github/copilot/references/aspnet-core-service-patterns.md
  • .github/copilot/references/dotnet-data-integration-patterns.md
  • .github/copilot/references/analysis-debug-review-patterns.md

Residual risk

Some old provider-specific/cloud/script references remain intentionally excluded until a bank-approved tool review.
